mode.description:
Mode selects the auth strategy: auto prefers token/pat when present and
falls back to credential login; token requires Token or PAT; credentials
requires Email and Password

token.description: Token is the API bearer token (PAT or API token)

pat.description: PAT is a personal access token; used as a fallback when Token is empty

email.description: Email is the login email used for auth-mode=credentials

password.description: Password is the login password used for auth-mode=credentials

config.OpenlaneAuthConfig.description: OpenlaneAuthConfig defines credentials and auth strategy

host.description: Host is the base URL for the Openlane API

auth.description: Auth controls authentication for API requests

config.OpenlaneConfig.description: OpenlaneConfig holds connection and auth defaults

openlane.description:
Openlane holds API host and authentication defaults used by every
subcommand that talks to the Openlane API

description: Config defines the structured CLI configuration
